SP: Enter Remove Line command
Read current Line status
Update Line status in persistent storage
Send Remove Line command to Switch Device
Display new Line status on CC Panel
Receive Restore Line command
Retrieve current Line Status from persistent storage
Update Line Status to Normal in persistent storage
Send Restore Line command to Switch Device
Display updated Line Status to CC Panel
Enter Forced Switch command
Read Line Status from persistent storage
Update Line Status in persistent storage
Send Forced Switch command to Switch Device
Display new Line Status on CC Panel
Enter Conditional Switch command
Read Line Status from storage
Update Line Status in persistent storage
Send Line Switch command to Switch Device
Display new Line Status to CC Panel
Receive QLCM Line failed signal
Read current Line status
Store updated Line status to persistent storage
Send Line switch command to Switch Device
Display new Line status on CC Panel

TEn: QLCM sends a Line Degraded signal
SP: Receive Line Degraded signal from QLCM
Read current Line Status from persistent storage
Update Line Status to Degraded in persistent storage
Send Line Switch command to Switch Device
Display new Line Status on CC Panel
Receive Line Cleared signal from QLCM
Read current Line Status from persistent storage
Update Line Status to Normal in persistent storage
Send Line Switch command to Switch Device
Display new Line Status on CC Panel
